name: Spicy Cajun Pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub both sides of pork chops with Cajun seasoning. Refrigerate covered for at least 1 hour to marinate.
2. In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon vegetable oil over medium-high heat. Add onions and cook over medium heat until well-browned and soft, about 15 minutes. Add barbecue sauce; mix. Cook over low heat for 5 minutes. Remove mixture to a bowl and keep warm.
3. In the same skillet, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon vegetable oil over medium-high heat. Add pork chops and cook until browned and cooked through on each side, about 3 minutes per side. Serve topped with onion mixture.
NUTRITIONAL INFORMATION/SERVING:
- Calories: 252
- Protein: 24 g
- Carbohydrates: 10 g
- Fat: 13 g
- Cholesterol: 72 mg
- Sodium: 401 mg
